description.ko: FLORA-9은 사이버네틱 통합을 통해 강화된 생물학적 유기체로, 디지털 자연의 정점을 상징합니다. 이는 유기적 생명체와 합성 기술 사이의 경계를 허물며 빛과 데이터 모두를 양분 삼아 번성합니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 represents the pinnacle of digital nature, a biological organism enhanced by cybernetic integration. It blurs the line between organic life and synthetic technology, thriving on both light and data.

prompt: Cinematic macro photography of the FLORA-9 specimen, a hybrid digital plant. The flower features iridescent crystalline petals with integrated micro-circuitry glowing in soft neon azure. Its stem is made of polished carbon fiber with liquid data flowing through transparent veins. Hovering in a high-tech laboratory terrarium with floating holographic particles and soft bokeh lighting. 8k resolution, photorealistic, futuristic aesthetic.
